## Checklist before requesting review

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] PR title follows `<type>(<slug>): <subject>` format
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] No commented-out code or debug logs left behind
